'''sayatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinobiose|arabinobiose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinobiose|arabinobiose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sayatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || sæyæthæth || sæyæthæj || sæyæthæsh || sæyæthæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || sayayathath || sayayathaj || sayayathash || sayayatha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || sayathath || sayathaj || sayathash || sayatha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || sayafthafth || sayafthafj || sayafthafsh || sayafthaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sayathatha || sayathaja || sayathasha || sayathaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || sayathath || sayathaj || sayathash || sayatha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sayathathal || sayathajal || sayathashal || sayathakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sayathaathatha || sayathaajaja || sayathaashasha || sayathaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || sayathathan || sayathajan || sayathashan || sayathakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sayathathaoro || sayathajaoro || sayathashaoro || sayathakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
